summary: DHH announces TextDrive as the official hosting partner for Ruby on Rails. TextDrive is a hosting company founded to support open source developers, already hosting several notable open source projects. Rails users get first-class support including GEMs, Subversion, Trac, and database options. The partnership includes a 50% profit-sharing arrangement to fund Rails development, making it an early model for sustainable open source funding.
key_points: TextDrive positioned as a hosting company built specifically to support open source developers and projects
Rails gets first-class technical support: latest GEMs, Subversion, Trac, PostgreSQL and MySQL
50% of hosting profits from Rails users go directly back to fund Rails development
Early example of creating a sustainable funding model for open source through commercial partnerships
money_quotes: TextDrive is an incredible cool hosting firm founded to support open source developers and projects by letting the users buy top-notch hosting straight from the source.
By being hosted on TextDrive, you're supporting Ruby on Rails development with 50% of the profits from your plan.
It won't take many people before that turns into a very meaningful contribution that will allow Rails to go above and beyond.
Be among the early adopters and you'll be able to tell your grand children that you helped Rails reach world domination.
key_insight: Even in Rails' earliest days, DHH was thinking about sustainable open source funding through commercial partnerships that directly tied hosting revenue to framework development.
